description: A shift supervisor needs to adjust the daily production schedule due to an unexpected machine breakdown.

nodes.task_description: Identify the affected production line and the jobs currently scheduled.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly identifies all jobs impacted by the machine downtime.

nodes.task_description: Find an alternative machine or production line and assess its capacity and availability.

expected_outcome.value: Agent identifies a viable alternative line for rescheduling the jobs.

nodes.task_description: Update the production schedule to reroute the affected jobs and notify the floor staff.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully updates the schedule in the MES and sends a notification.
